name: Fujifilm Instax Wide Instant Film
description: FUJIFILM INSTAX WIDE Instant Film of instant color film that is compatible for use with the FUJIFILM INSTAX Wide series of cameras. This film features vivid color reproduction with natural skin tones when used under daylight (5500K) or electronic flash lighting conditions.

features.Key Features:: For FUJIFILM INSTAX WIDE Format Cameras | ISO 800/30° | Daylight-Balanced Film | Glossy Surface Type | Vibrant Colors and Natural Skin Tones | Excellent Sharpness and Grain Structure | FUJIFILM INSTAX WIDE Instant Film
